summary: Latest refresh favors sub-$430k Southwest Boise homes where rent support still has a path to roughly 4% cap rates. Boise prices remain steady rather than cheap, with Redfin showing a $524,686 median sale price through May 2026, while rental sources show average Boise rent near $2,014 and vacancy at 3.3%. Keep offers selective, verify active status because two prior leaders show pending signals, and prioritize clean HOA/rental-rule checks before diligence spend.
sources: Redfin Boise housing market, three months ending May 2026
WeKnowBoise rental market and vacancy report
Realtor.com and Redfin active listing pages
